title: Add NetworkPolicy sub-reconciler for network isolation
summary: All external reviewer feedback (berendt, review #2) has been correctly addressed: B-001 webhook defense-in-depth validation added with 3 dedicated tests + aggregate test update; B-002 Chainsaw E2E tests added covering create/update/delete lifecycle; W-001 reconcile ordering moved NetworkPolicy before Deployment with rationale comment; W-002 controller test updated to assert NetworkPolicyReady is set before Deployment; I-001 code comments document egress destination limitation; I-002 acknowledged as intentional duplication. All tests pass, go vet clean, no lint errors. Code follows existing patterns consistently.

tests_checklist.item: Tests exist and pass (go test ./... all OK)
Edge cases covered (empty ingress guard, brownfield-only DNS, nil networkPolicy paths)
Error cases tested (ensure error propagation, delete error propagation)
Webhook validation tests: nil valid, with-ingress valid, empty-ingress rejected
Aggregate RunsAllValidations test updated with networkPolicy
E2E Chainsaw tests cover create, update, and delete lifecycle
ObservedGeneration tracked in both enabled and not-required paths
No-op update detection tested (snapshot comparison guard)

code_quality_checklist.item: Error wrapping uses fmt.Errorf('verb context: %w', err)
No dead code or unused functions
Constants used for condition types and reasons

security_checklist.item: CEL XValidation mirrors webhook validation semantics (size(self.ingress) > 0)
Defense-in-depth: webhook, reconciler guard, and CRD validation all reject empty ingress
SetControllerReference on both create and update paths
Fail closed on empty ingress (no NetworkPolicy created)
Helm ClusterRole template includes networking.k8s.io/networkpolicies rule

architecture_checklist.item: Reconcile ordering: NetworkPolicy before Deployment (pods born into restricted network)
Owns(&networkingv1.NetworkPolicy{}) correctly registered (operator creates with ownerRef)
NetworkPolicy name derived from CR name via apiResourceName() (multi-instance safe)
RBAC marker matches Helm ClusterRole template

dry_yagni_checklist.item: No duplicated code beyond acknowledged npNormalizeMap (documented, awaiting second consumer)

fail_fast_checklist.item: Empty ingress returns error immediately before any NetworkPolicy creation

defensive_checklist.item: Three-layer validation: CRD CEL, webhook, reconciler guard
Snapshot comparison prevents no-op API writes
Owner reference enforced on update path (re-set if removed out-of-band)

suggested_improvements: I-001 acknowledged: egress rules currently allow any destination on MariaDB/Memcached ports. Code comments document this as a known limitation with deferred tightening. No action needed now.
The catch block in the E2E test (Step 2) includes NetworkPolicy-specific diagnostics (kubectl get networkpolicy) which is a good addition over the autoscaling reference pattern.
next_steps: Merge: all blocking and major checks pass, all external reviewer feedback addressed
